title: Stellarity Better Combat Addon
description: Add Better Combat presets to Stellarity's custom weapons
body:
Remember to install this too.
[Stellarity RP Fix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stellarity-bettercombat-rp-fix)

Add Better Combat compatabilities to [Stellarity](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity)'s weapons.

Datapack need to be installed before you obtain a weapon, weapons obtained before installing the pack won't be updated. For more customization visit my [Github](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellarity-enlightened)

This is built for the datapack-based version (aka Stellarity), not [Stellarity Enlightened](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellarity-enlightened), for that go here:
